architecture.summary: Single Docusaurus Markdown page at docs/reference/configuration.md. Structure: intro, disableable features table, config.json by category, metadata.json, env vars. Sidebar entry in Reference section.

integrations.summary: No external integrations. Page documents integration configs (GitHub/JIRA/ADO) but is static Markdown. No API calls.

ui-ux.summary: Standard Docusaurus Markdown with tables, code blocks, admonitions. Disableable features table near top for discoverability. Sections by category matching config.json structure.

performance.summary: Static Markdown page, no runtime concerns. Docusaurus handles long pages with auto-TOC.

security.summary: Credential env vars documented with note to use env vars/secret managers, never hardcode. No secrets in docs.

edge-cases.summary: Page stays under 1500 lines. Config properties sourced from TypeScript interfaces. If source changes, manual doc update needed.
